html:
The Log Suit is a wearable Armor, crafted in the Armour Filter. It requires 8 Logs and 2 Ropes to craft and a Science Machine to prototype.

It has 315 durability and absorbs 80% of Physical Damage. It can also be used as fuel for a Campfire or Fire Pit, even when its durability is nearly gone. Not considering its durability, the log suit effectively adds 600 to a survivor with 150 .

Usage

×3

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Woven - Elegant Jagged Wood Armor, Silken Wood Armor and Wood Armor skins were introduced during the official The Forge event in 2017.
  • The Woven - Elegant Roman Wood Armor skin was introduced during the official Year of the Carrat event in 2020.
Woven - Elegant
Forge Collection
Jagged Wood Armor
The fangs are purely decorative. They're not even real!
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Forge Collection
Silken Wood Armor
This silken wood armor provides no additional protection, but at least it stops the splinters.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Forge Collection
Wood Armor
This wood armor is a fresh decorative take on a timeless functional design.
See ingame
Woven - Elegant
Year of the Carrat Collection
Roman Wood Armor
Battle-ready wooden armor, inspired by warriors of old.
See ingame
Loyal
Gustree Wood Armor
It's solid armor, just don't mind the draft.

Tips

  • If the player is in a place with infinite darkness such as the Caves, the player can equip a Log Suit for damage reduction and a Miner Hat or Moggles to safely fight enemies.

Trivia

  • The Log Suit was originally prototyped with the Alchemy Engine.
  • A Character wearing the Log Suit makes slight clicking noises while running.

Filters

Miscellaneous
"armorwood"
“That is a perfectly reasonable piece of clothing.”
–Wilson
“Now I can take on the world!”
–Willow
“Is almost strong as belly!”
–Wolfgang
“I might hold off the inevitable a bit longer with this.”
–Wendy
“UPGRADED ARMOR”
–WX-78
“Crude plate mail cobbled together from log sections.”
–Wickerbottom
“It fits me so well!”
–Woodie
“Ugh. I'm not typically one for vulgar fisticuffs.”
–Maxwell
“I can study my attackers more closely with this rudimentary armor.”
–Wagstaff
“A börröwed tree vest.”
–Wigfrid
“Wood you like to fight?”
–Webber
“I hope the attacker doesn't have an axe.”
–Walani
“Sturdy, but quite flammable.”
–Warly
“At least wood floats.”
–Woodlegs
“TIS ARMOR MADE OF TREE BITS”
–Wilba
“Friend shirt.”
–Wormwood
“I think it brings out the color in my eyes.”
–Wheeler
“Punch me! It does nothing! Ha!”
–Winona
“Knock on wood, they say, they say!”
–Wortox
“Wood shirt!”
–Wurt
“Trees are pretty useful.”
–Walter
“Good enough for now.”
–Wanda
The Log Suit is a wearable Armor, crafted in the Armour Filter. It requires 8 Logs and 2 Ropes to craft and a Science Machine to prototype.
It has 315 durability and absorbs 80% of Physical Damage. It can also be used as fuel for a Campfire or Fire Pit, even when its durability is nearly gone. Not considering its durability, the log suit effectively adds 600 to a survivor with 150 .

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Log Suit là một bộ giáp có thể đeo được, được chế tạo trong Armor Filter. Nó cần 8 Gỗ và 2 Dây Thừng để chế tạo và Máy Khoa Học để tạo nguyên mẫu.

Ha! |wortox = Knock on wood, they say, they say! |wurt = Wood shirt! |walter = Trees are pretty useful. |wanda = Good enough for now. |choose = wendy}} The '''Log Suit''' is a wearable [[Armor]], crafted in the [[Armour Filter]]. It requires 8 [[Log]]s and 2 [[Rope]]s to craft and a [[Science Machine]] to prototype. It has 315 durability and absorbs 80% of [[Physical Damage]]. It can also be used as [[fuel]] for a [[Campfire]] or [[Fire Pit]], even when its durability is nearly gone. Not considering its durability, the log suit effectively adds 600 {{Hp}} to a survivor with 150 {{Hp}}. == {{Pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage == {{Recipe |item2 = Scales |count2 = 1 |item1 = Log Suit |count1 = 1 |item3 = Pig Skin |count3 = 3 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Scalemail }} == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Armor_Items|Belongings}} * The '''Woven - Elegant Jagged Wood Armor''', '''Silken Wood Armor''' and '''Wood Armor''' skins were introduced during the official [[The Forge]] event in 2017. * The '''Woven - Elegant Roman Wood Armor''' skin was introduced during the official [[Year of the Carrat]] event in 2020.

They're not even real! |ingame = Jagged Wood Armor Wilson.png }} {{SkinInfo |image = Silken Wood Armor Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = Forge Collection |name = Silken Wood Armor |description = This silken wood armor provides no additional protection, but at least it stops the splinters. |ingame = Silken Wood Armor Wilson.png }} {{SkinInfo |image = Wood Armor Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = Forge Collection |name = Wood Armor |description = This wood armor is a fresh decorative take on a timeless functional design. |ingame = Wood Armor Wilson.png }} {{SkinInfo |image = Roman Wood Armor Icon.png |rarity = Woven - Elegant |collection = Year of the Carrat Collection |name = Roman Wood Armor |description = Battle-ready wooden armor, inspired by warriors of old. |ingame = Roman Wood Armor Wilson.png }} {{SkinInfo |image = Gustree Wood Armor Icon.png |rarity = Loyal |name = Gustree Wood Armor |description = It's solid armor, just don't mind the draft. }}
